title: Forward Deployed AI Engineer
company_focus: Autonomous coding agents for software development
description:
Emergent builds autonomous coding agents that replace
traditional software development by generating, testing, and
deploying production applications directly from plain-
language intent. Our systems run in production at global
scale and are used to build millions of real applications.

Since public launch, Emergent has reached $100M ARR in 8
months. 6M+ users across 190+ countries have built 6.5M+
applications on Emergent. We've raised $100M+, backed by
Khosla Ventures, SoftBank, Google, Lightspeed, Prosus,
Together, and Y Combinator.

We're solving the hard part of AI-driven software creation:
correctness, reliability, security, and scale in real
production systems. The team is built by repeat founders,
Olympiad medalists, IIT & IIM alumni, and leaders from
Google, Amazon, and Dropbox.

We're hiring builders who want ownership, speed, and impact
at global scale.

What you will do? 1. Ensure smooth performance of AI-
generated applications 2. Debug functional issues across
frontend, backend, and database layers in live environments
3. Guide users in building stable apps with our autonomous
development platform 4. Collaborate with internal teams to
enhance product stability and user experience 5. Build
troubleshooting guides and quick fixes for recurring
patterns

What we are looking for? 1. 2+ years in
production/application support or full-stack engineering 2.
Strong skills in React, Python, SQL

3. Hands-on experience in web development, including
building web applications and working with APIs.

4. Excellent debugging and problem-solving ability

5. Bachelor’s in any engineering degree or related field

You'll have the opportunity to: 1. Work with cutting-edge
technology while solving novel analytical challenges 2.
Shape the future of how businesses measure and optimize AI
agent effectiveness

Perks: 1. Hands-on experience on live projects. 2.
Mentorship from senior engineers.



Let’s build the future of software together.
responsibilities: Ensure smooth performance of AI-generated applications
Debug functional issues across frontend, backend, and database layers in live environments
Guide users in building stable apps with our autonomous development platform
Collaborate with internal teams to enhance product stability and user experience
Build troubleshooting guides and quick fixes for recurring patterns
use_cases: Autonomous generation of production applications from plain-language intent
Testing and deploying AI-generated code at global scale
Building millions of applications through AI-driven software creation
Ensuring correctness, reliability, security, and scale of AI-generated systems
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a Forward Deployed AI Engineer role focused on
supporting and troubleshooting AI-generated applications,
debugging issues, guiding users, and building
troubleshooting guides. While it's customer-facing, the work
involves supporting existing AI systems rather than
building, training, or deploying models and agents, which
aligns with ai-support.
